relationship_to_restored_text: Interpretive contemplative layer aligned by verse. This does not replace the source-audited restored translation.

verses.mystical_translation: Jesus crosses into Gerasene territory.
From the tombs, a tormented man meets him immediately.
He lives among death-spaces where ordinary restraint has failed.
Human binding could not bring healing.
Night and day his pain echoes among tombs and mountains.
From far off, he runs and bows before Jesus.
The hidden forces recognize the Son of the Most High.
Jesus commands release from the man.
The name Legion reveals a fragmented multitude.
The forces plead not to be sent from the region.
A large herd feeds nearby.
They ask to enter the herd.
The disorder leaves the man and rushes toward the sea.
The keepers report what happened.
The man is found seated, clothed, and sound-minded; restoration frightens the onlookers.
Witnesses tell the story.
The region asks Jesus to leave.
The restored man wants to remain with him.
Jesus sends him home as a witness of mercy.
He proclaims in the Decapolis what Jesus has done.
Jesus crosses back and the crowd gathers again.
Jairus falls at his feet.
A father asks for touch so his daughter may live.
Jesus goes with him through the pressing crowd.
A woman has carried a flow of blood for twelve years.
She has spent everything and suffered without healing.
She reaches from behind to touch his garment.
Her trust says touch is enough.
Immediately her body knows healing.
Jesus feels power go out and seeks the one who touched.
The disciples see only the crowd pressure.
Jesus looks for the person inside the crowd.
The woman comes trembling and tells the whole truth.
He calls her daughter and sends her into peace and wholeness.
News of death arrives before Jairus’ request is complete.
Jesus answers fear with trust.
Only the inner three continue with him.
The house is full of mourning.
Jesus speaks of sleep where others see finality.
He clears the room and enters with parents and witnesses.
Taking her hand, he speaks Aramaic life: Little girl, rise.
Immediately the twelve-year-old rises and walks.
He protects the mystery and asks that she be fed.
